required.description: Whether this observation is load-bearing for the snapshot's overall pass/fail. Required observations gate the snapshot; informational ones do not. Default False (informational).
required.title: Required

PayloadObservation.description:
A structured payload of arbitrary shape.

Used for rich data the fixed-shape kinds cannot carry — full DOM,
per-element layout/computed-style tables, accessibility trees,
screenshots (as base64), comparison results, and so on. The
``payload_schema`` field names the shape of ``data``; the framework
dispatches diff and render on this discriminator. Unknown
``payload_schema`` values render as a generic JSON dump and diff
structurally.

data.description: Schema-specific payload — opaque to the framework.
data.title: Data

entity_id.description: Content-derived stable entity id assigned by the framework. Comments and resolutions anchor to this; survives recapture.
entity_id.title: Entity Id

payload_schema.description: Discriminator naming the shape of `data`. Recognised values ('dom_tree', 'screenshot', 'comparison') get first-class diff/render; unknown values fall back to a generic JSON dump.
payload_schema.title: Payload Schema

required.description: Whether this observation is load-bearing for the snapshot's overall pass/fail. Required observations gate the snapshot; informational ones do not. Default False (informational).
required.title: Required

PayloadObservation.title: PayloadObservation

description: Canonical catalog of observation kinds (scalar, boolean, rule_check, set, distribution, histogram). Discriminated by `kind`. All envelope schemas $ref these definitions instead of inlining them.
